title: Silky Sweet Norwegian Salmon Roast
description: A cozy, sweet roast salmon infused with garlic, dill, and honey for a silky finish. Ideal for a halal-friendly dinner that feels like a Scandinavian comfort dish.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 200°C (400°F) and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a small bowl, whisk together honey, soy sauce, minced garlic, lemon zest, and olive oil to create a glaze.
Pat the salmon fillets dry with paper towels, then season each side with salt and pepper.
Place the fillets skin‑side up on the prepared sheet and brush generously with the glaze.
Roast in the preheated oven for 12–15 minutes, or until the salmon flakes easily with a fork and the glaze is caramelized.
During the last 2 minutes, switch the oven to broil and watch for a golden top—do not let the glaze burn.
Remove from oven, drizzle remaining glaze over the fillets, and sprinkle with chopped dill.
Serve immediately, pairing with a simple green salad or steamed root vegetables for a balanced meal.
